feat.name: Treespeech
feat.text: Your connection to elemental wood allows you to communicate with trees in the Universe in Muan, the language of wood elementals. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with woody plants like trees and shrubs.

traits.name: Ardande
traits.text: Ardandes are planar scions descended from kizidhar and other beings of elemental wood.
